twitter_posts.title:
I think modern LLMs are p-zombies without moral patienthood—on par with insects, at best, in my moral calculus.

But I also I think we should establish norms for treating models well *before* models w
twitter_posts.description:
I think modern LLMs are p-zombies without moral patienthood—on par with insects, at best, in my moral calculus.

But I also I think we should establish norms for treating models well *before* models with patienthood exist—i.e. now. We should want to have this right from day one.
twitter_posts.author: Riley Goodside
